description: This file defines an AWS CDK construct for setting up an API Gateway with associated authorization, API keys, and usage plans for a multi-tenant SaaS application. It includes class and method definitions for creating and configuring the API Gateway, authorizer functions, and related IAM roles.

classes.name: ApiGateway
classes.description: A CDK construct class that sets up an API Gateway with authorization, API keys, and usage plans for a tenant.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the ApiGateway construct, creating the authorizer function, IAM role, API Gateway, and usage plans based on provided properties.
